diagrams.title: JDBC Data Type Mapping Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the bidirectional mapping between Java and SQL data types
elements: Java Types (left): int, long, String, Date, Timestamp, BigDecimal, byte[], Reader
SQL Types (middle): INTEGER, BIGINT, VARCHAR, DATE, TIMESTAMP, DECIMAL, BLOB, CLOB
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how data flows between Java application and database, showing conversion points

diagrams.title: ResultSet Getter Selection Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision tree for choosing correct getter method
elements: Branch 2: Numeric Precision? → Decimal/NUMERIC → getBigDecimal() → Integer types → getInt/getLong based on size
Branch 3: Date/Time? → DATE → getDate() | TIME → getTime() | TIMESTAMP → getTimestamp()
diagrams.purpose: Help developers select the appropriate getter method based on column type and requirements

diagrams.title: PreparedStatement Parameter Setting
diagrams.description: Shows how to set different data type parameters in PreparedStatement
diagrams.purpose: Reference guide for setting parameters with correct type conversion
